function.name: read_file
function.description: Read and return the UTF-8 text content of a file in the project.

path.description: File path relative to the project root.

function.name: search_files
function.description: Recursively search for files in the project using a glob pattern.

function.name: create_file
function.description: Create a new UTF-8 text file in the project. This tool does not overwrite existing files.

path.description: New file path relative to the project root.

content.description: Complete text content to write to the new file.
